channel.title: MexIHC 2026 - News (EN)
channel.description: Official RSS feed for MexIHC 2026 news and updates in English.

item.title: Student Design Competition is open for MexIHC 2026
item.description: Check the 2026 Student Design Competition call and submit your proposal before August 16, 2026.

item.title: Call for Tutorials is open for MexIHC 2026
item.description: The organizing committee invites the submission of tutorial proposals on topics related to HCI.

item.title: Call for Papers is open for MexIHC 2026
item.description: Check submission guidelines, topics, and important dates for the Call for Papers.

item.title: MexIHC 2026 conference dates announced
item.description: MexIHC 2026 will take place October 27-30, 2026 in Ensenada, Baja California.
